project: Portfolio Analytics Platform — front-end + API layer
overall_status: Feature-complete for v0.1 against the reference backend; verified locally; ready to deploy via IP:port. Not yet wired to the real PostgreSQL backend.

components.name: Reference backend (SQLite)
components.detail: Disposable dev DB. src/db/connection.py (get_connection contextmanager, renamed from session.py), schema/NN_*.sql, seed.py, build_reference_db.py.

components.name: FastAPI API
components.detail: web/api/main.py + routes/ + services/. Serves /api and the static bundle at / (single origin, no CORS).

components.name: Price Viewer dashboard
components.detail: Prices by source; Bloomberg-style hover (multi-line tooltip, crosshair, x-axis date tag).

components.name: Positioning dashboard
components.detail: Holdings table + weight breakdown donut; driven by date-range END (snaps to latest snapshot <= date).

components.name: Contribution dashboard
components.detail: Contribution bar + table; single-period approximation. Provider seam ready for future fact_contribution.

components.name: Shared DateRangePicker
components.detail: Common From/To selector used by all three dashboards.

components.name: Static export build + packaging
components.detail: npm run build -> out/ ; packaged dashboards-0.1.0.zip (1.5 MB), relative /api URLs confirmed.

components.name: fact_contribution provider seam
components.detail: DerivedContributionProvider (now) vs FactContributionProvider (future); auto-selects when table has data. Table created EMPTY.

components.name: Deployment to i7 (IP:port)
components.detail: Workflow defined (build->GitHub Release zip->i7 swap). Not yet executed on i7. Decision: use IP + port on the floor subnet.

components.name: Port to real PostgreSQL + psycopg v3
components.detail: Swap src/db/connection.py internals; ? -> %s placeholders. HTTP/JSON contract + Next bundle unchanged.

components.name: Always-on process management (Task Scheduler)
components.detail: uvicorn currently run manually; register under Task Scheduler with --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000.

current_runtime_state.local_dev_server_8000: NOT running (start with: PYTHONPATH=. python -m uvicorn web.api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000)

verification_done: All API endpoints return correct enriched data
Static export build passes (7 pages prerender, no SSR errors)
FastAPI serves bundle at / and API at /api on the same origin
Holdings snap-to-date works for free dates
Contribution provider auto-switch verified (empty->derived, populated->fact, cleanup->derived)
Production bundle bakes RELATIVE /api URLs (no absolute base leaked)
Module rename src.db.session -> src.db.connection: no stale refs, all imports OK
hosting_decision: IP + port on the shared same-floor subnet (e.g. http://<i7-ip>:8000/). Requires uvicorn --host 0.0.0.0 + Windows Firewall inbound rule for the port. Vanity domain deferred (would need an internal DNS A record from IT).

environment_constraints.corporate_ssl_interception: pip: --trusted-host pypi.org --trusted-host files.pythonhosted.org ; npm: npm config set strict-ssl false
environment_constraints.i7_server: No admin, no Node/npm; FastAPI + PostgreSQL; Task Scheduler for process management

open_items: Register uvicorn under Task Scheduler (--host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000) for always-on hosting
Add Windows Firewall inbound rule for the chosen port (needs admin / desktop support)
Execute first i7 deployment (download Release zip -> swap into out/ -> restart)
Port reference backend to real PostgreSQL + psycopg v3
Build the ETL that populates fact_contribution (dashboard switches provider automatically)
Optional: DASHBOARDS_BUNDLE_DIR env override, .nvmrc, scripts/package_dashboards.sh, scripts/serve.bat
Optional: decide if Positioning should support a two-date holdings delta
risks_gotchas: NEXT_PUBLIC_* baked at build time -> build with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE unset
trailingSlash:true -> use /prices/ etc.; static serving won't redirect /prices
StaticFiles mounts at startup -> restart uvicorn after first deploy of out/
Replace out/ atomically (temp dir + mv) to avoid stale hashed-chunk references
.gitignore ignores out/ and *.zip -> distribute the bundle via GitHub Release, not git
